\"Shadow Pokémon are Pokémon that have t: "Shadow Pokémon are Pokémon that have their hearts closed.
They cannot gain experience or evolve in: They cannot gain experience or evolve in this state.
In this form they are more aggressive an: In this form they are more aggressive and powerful.
They gain moves called Shadow moves. The: They gain moves called Shadow moves. These moves are effective against every type except Fairy and Shadow.

However, when these moves are used, the: However, when these moves are used, the Pokémon has a chance of entering Hyper Mode.
In Hyper Mode, the Pokémon has a higher: In Hyper Mode, the Pokémon has a higher critical hit chance.
On the downside, they are inflicted by t: On the downside, they are inflicted by their own darkness each turn.
In addition, Pokémon may refuse to obey: In addition, Pokémon may refuse to obey their trainers.
The only way to get a Pokémon out of Hyp: The only way to get a Pokémon out of Hyper Mode is to call their names out or heal them at a Pokémon Center. "

When this gauge is completely empty, the: When this gauge is completely empty, the Pokémon will be ready for purification.
However, purification cannot happen with: However, purification cannot happen without the use of a Relic Shrine.
When Shadow Pokémon are purified, they g: When Shadow Pokémon are purified, they gain any experience they have obtained in battle.
They also lose their Shadow typing and t: They also lose their Shadow typing and their Shadow moveset.
These are replaced with the moves they o: These are replaced with the moves they originally had beforehand, as well as a move it is normally not capable of learning. "
